user.title: PostNord
user.description: Enter your PostNord API key. Postal code is optional and enables a mailbox delivery schedule sensor.

add_package.title: Add package
add_package.description: Enter one or more tracking numbers or PostNord tracking URLs, one per line.

change_interval.title: Update interval
change_interval.description: How often active packages should be refreshed (minutes).

change_postal_code.title: Postal code for mailbox delivery
change_postal_code.description: Leave empty to disable the mailbox delivery sensor.

error.already_configured: All specified packages are already configured.
